name: Batas a Portuguesa- Portuguese Fried Potatoe
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Oil (olive oil may be used)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a pan, heat butter and oil. Fry potatoes on both sides until golden brown.
2. Season potatoes with salt and pepper. Transfer to a heated platter and serve immediately. Sprinkle with parsley. Serves 4.
